title: Polymer clay sculpted fox
notes: A sitting fox figurine approximately 60 mm tall. Body is a teardrop shape, muzzle is a pushed-forward wedge, ears are two pointed slabs. Tail is a thick coil curved around behind. Orange, white, and black polymer clay blended at boundaries for natural colouring. Cured in stages (body separately from thin pieces). Glass bead or polymer bead eyes. Satin varnish finish.
